_comment: Manual overrides for events Yahoo's API can't surface (older than ~14 days). Edit this file directly to add known upcoming earnings dates or save-the-dates. Each entry should have at minimum 'last_event_date' (ISO timestamp). The poller will preserve these unless a newer event is detected via Yahoo.
_example_format: TICKER → object with last_event_date, last_event_title, last_event_source ('manual'), last_event_url

FIVE.name: Five Below, Inc.
FIVE.last_event_title: Five Below, Inc. Announces First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Date
FIVE.manual_note: Q1 FY2026 earnings call confirmed for Wednesday, June 3, 2026 at 4:30 PM ET. Article published May 20, aged out of Yahoo's 10-item recency window.
